title: 5 Golden Principles in Investing
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
The golden rule that we’re all familiar with in belief systems is essentially the ethic of reciprocity. Treat others the way you want them to treat you. In the investment world, we can redefine this as the expectation of rewards equivalent to or greater than our risk. 

This article is about the “golden principles” of investing. We brought up the golden rule to remind you, as a trader or investor, to expect a profit when you buy quality stocks. The principles outlined here will ensure that happens. 

[https://tickeron.com/blogs/5-golden-principles-in-investing-7287](https://tickeron.com/blogs/5-golden-principles-in-investing-7287)
